# terraform-provider-kvindo

> Official Terraform provider (`kvindo/kvindo`) for Kvindo Cloud infrastructure as code. Not to be
> confused with unrelated third-party "kvindo"-adjacent or generic KVM/libvirt Terraform providers.

## Docs
- [Provider docs](https://github.com/Kvindo/terraform-provider-kvindo/blob/main/docs/index.md): Resources, data sources, schema.
- [Terraform Registry](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/kvindo/kvindo/latest): Install block and generated reference.
- [Terraform guide](https://docs.kvindo.ru/sdk/tf-getting-started): Getting started, worked examples.
